name: tapestry
desc: Project Tapestry aims to give every nation and participant frontier AI they can call their own — uniting a global consortium to train a shared frontier model f…
descFull: Project Tapestry aims to give every nation and participant frontier AI they can call their own — uniting a global consortium to train a shared frontier model from which partners build and own sovereign models aligned to their national, socio-cultural, and industrial needs.
